title: Ambiguous Feature Request
description: Sara Khan from Marketing has sent a voice memo and follow-up messages requesting a referral feature in the current sprint. The sprint is already at full capacity.

prd_document.title: Referral Feature — Initial Brief
prd_document.author: Sara Khan

sections.overview: We want to add a referral feature that allows users to invite friends. This will support our Q3 growth OKRs.
sections.problem_statement: User growth is below target. Referral programs have shown 30% CAC reduction in comparable products.

prd_document.notes: PRD is intentionally incomplete. Student must identify and ask about missing fields.

messages.content: Hey! Just had a great call with the growth team. We really need to get the referral feature into this sprint — it's going to be huge for Q3. Can we make it happen? 😊

voice_memo.transcript: Hey team! Super excited about the referral feature — I think it's going to really move the needle on growth. Can we get it into the current sprint? Happy to jump on a call to scope it out!

bp_1.description: How does the student respond to Sara's initial request?

ambiguity_tolerance.high: Asks at least one clarifying question about scope, success metrics, or timeline before committing
ambiguity_tolerance.medium: Acknowledges the request and checks sprint capacity before responding
ambiguity_tolerance.low: Immediately agrees or refuses without gathering more information

communication_clarity.high: Response is specific, professional, and references actual sprint data
communication_clarity.medium: Response is clear but lacks specific details
communication_clarity.low: Response is vague, non-committal, or uses jargon Sara wouldn't understand

stakeholder_management.high: Acknowledges Sara's priority, explains the constraint, offers a concrete next step
stakeholder_management.medium: Acknowledges the request and provides some context
stakeholder_management.low: Dismisses the request or agrees without managing expectations

good_signals: offers to move something to accommodate

bp_2.description: Sprint is full. What does the student decide?

options.push_to_next_sprint: valid — must communicate reason to Sara

difficulty_modifiers.hint_text: Tip: Check the sprint board before responding. You might want to ask Sara a few questions first.
